final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input serial_in,
    output reg serial_out
);
    reg [7:0] unused_shift_reg;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            unused_shift_reg <= 8'b0;
            serial_out <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            serial_out <= unused_shift_reg[7]; // Output the MSB
            unused_shift_reg <= {unused_shift_reg[6:0], serial_in}; // Shift left
        end
    end
endmodule
